title: GST/HST rebate – Poppies and wreaths - Canada.ca
content:
## GST/HST rebate – Poppies and wreaths
Form GST189 – Reason code 24
Reason code 24 provides a rebate of the GST/HST paid on poppies and wreaths by legion entities ( subsection 259.2(2) of the Excise Tax Act ).

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
